data.content: Rolling parent back because child knots-c8f4 failed plan review. The current plan scope is incomplete: it calls out autopilot_with_pr.loom but misses loom/knots_sdlc/profiles/autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom, which still contains a legacy output pr override. Revise the parent and child plans so the canonicalization sweep is exhaustive before re-entering plan review.
